$comment: Single source of truth for repos monitored by both `.github/workflows/private-actions-monitor.yml` (blackout detector) and `.github/workflows/actions-cost-audit.yml` (cost auditor). Edit here first when adding/removing a repo; both workflows hardcode the list literally for now (future v3 may `require()` this at runtime). See `docs/actions-cost-runbook.md` for maintenance guidance.

$repos_excluded.$comment: Repos intentionally NOT in the list. Recheck periodically. A repo gaining its first workflow (private) or going public should move between lists.
$repos_excluded.thinkyou0714/codex-toolkit: public repo — Actions are unlimited free; can't be impacted by spending limit
$repos_excluded.thinkyou0714/.github: public repo — account profile, no monitoring needed
$repos_excluded.thinkyou0714/thinkyou0714: public repo — profile README, no monitoring needed
$repos_excluded.thinkyou0714/claude-lab-config: private but has 0 workflows — querying would 404 noisily; recheck if workflows are added
